---
title: "Analysis"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
# Importing functions
function_files <- list.files("Functions", pattern = "\\.R$", full.names = TRUE)
invisible(lapply(sort(function_files), source))

# Importing config file
config <- read_yaml("config.yaml")

# Creating project directories
create_project_dirs(overwrite = config$run$overwrite)

run_qc <- isTRUE(config$analysis$run_qc)
run_climate <- isTRUE(config$analysis$run_climate)
run_ld_pruning <- isTRUE(config$analysis$run_ld_pruning)
run_pca <- isTRUE(config$analysis$run_pca)
run_lmm <- isTRUE(config$analysis$run_lmm)
```

# Quality Control
## Filtering
```{r, eval = run_qc, include = run_qc}
keep_file <- NULL

if (config$subsetting$use_keep) {
  subset_metadata <- read.csv(config$subsetting$sample_metadata, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  
  keep_file <- create_keep_file(
    metadata = subset_metadata,
    fam_file = paste0(config$genotype$input_prefix, ".fam"),
    output_file = config$subsetting$keep_file,
    sample_col = config$metadata$sample_col
  )
}

# Filtering by general QC thresholds
qc_files <- paste0(config$outputs$qc_prefix, c(".bed", ".bim", ".fam"))

if (!config$run$overwrite && all(file.exists(qc_files))) {
  message("Reusing existing QC PLINK files: ", config$outputs$qc_prefix)
  qc_prefix <- config$outputs$qc_prefix
} else {
  qc_prefix <- plink_filter(
    input = config$genotype$input_prefix,
    output = config$outputs$qc_prefix,
    plink = config$plink$path,
    keep = keep_file,
    geno_na = config$qc$geno_na,
    maf = config$qc$maf,
    ind_na = config$qc$ind_na
  )
}

# extracting markers if required
if (isTRUE(config$marker_subsetting$use_extract)) {
  qc_prefix <- plink_extract_markers(
    input = qc_prefix,
    output = config$marker_subsetting$output_prefix,
    plink = config$plink$path,
    extract_file = config$marker_subsetting$extract_file,
    overwrite = config$run$overwrite
  )
}

# Filtering metadata to filtered genotype data
metadata <- filter_metadata(
  metadata_file = config$metadata$file,
  fam_file = paste0(qc_prefix, ".fam"),
  sample_col = config$metadata$sample_col,
  output_file = config$metadata$filtered_file
)
```

```{r}
# In case QC module is not ran
if (!exists("qc_prefix")) {
  qc_prefix <- config$outputs$qc_prefix
  qc_files <- paste0(qc_prefix, c(".bed", ".bim", ".fam"))
  if (!all(file.exists(qc_files))) {
    message("QC was not run and QC files were not found. Using raw genotype prefix.")
    qc_prefix <- config$genotype$input_prefix
  } else {
    message("QC was not run. Reusing existing QC files: ", qc_prefix)
  }
}
```

# Environmental Variables
## Climate Variables
```{r, eval = run_climate, include = run_climate}
# Extracting climate variables
climate_data <- extract_climate_variables(
  metadata = metadata,
  lon_col = config$climate$lon_col,
  lat_col = config$climate$lat_col,
  sample_col = config$metadata$sample_col,
  var = config$climate$var,
  res = config$climate$res,
  climate_dir = config$climate$path,
  output_file = config$climate$output_file,
  overwrite = config$run$overwrite
)

head(climate_data)
```

## Refiltering
```{r, eval = run_climate, include = run_climate}
# Refiltering genotype data to match samples with climate variables
climate_keep_file <- create_keep_file(
  metadata = climate_data,
  fam_file = paste0(qc_prefix, ".fam"),
  output_file = config$climate$keep_file,
  sample_col = config$metadata$sample_col
)

climate_files <- paste0(config$outputs$climate_prefix, c(".bed", ".bim", ".fam"))
if (!config$run$overwrite && all(file.exists(climate_files))) {
  message("Reusing climate-filtered PLINK files: ", config$outputs$climate_prefix)
  qc_prefix <- config$outputs$climate_prefix
} else {
  qc_prefix <- plink_filter(
    input = qc_prefix,
    output = config$outputs$climate_prefix,
    plink = config$plink$path,
    keep = climate_keep_file,
    geno_na = config$qc$geno_na,
    maf = config$qc$maf,
    ind_na = NULL
  )
}

# Refiltering metadata
metadata <- filter_metadata(
  metadata_file = config$metadata$file,
  fam_file = paste0(qc_prefix, ".fam"),
  sample_col = config$metadata$sample_col,
  output_file = config$metadata$filtered_file
)

message("Samples after genotype-climate matching: ", nrow(metadata))
```

## Climatic Data QC
### Variable Distribution
```{r, eval = run_climate, include = run_climate}
plot_climate_map(
  climate_data = climate_data,
  metadata = metadata,
  sample_col = config$metadata$sample_col,
  lon_col = config$climate$lon_col,
  lat_col = config$climate$lat_col,
  color_col = "BIO1"
)
```

### Correlation
```{r, eval = run_climate, include = run_climate}
plot_climate_cor_heatmap(
  climate_data = climate_data
)
```

### Climate PCA
```{r, eval = run_climate, include = run_climate}
climate_pca <- run_climate_pca(
  climate_data = climate_data,
  output_file = "Output/Structure/climate_pca.rds"
)

plot_climate_pca(climate_pca)
```


# Population Structure
## LD-pruning
```{r, eval = run_ld_pruning, include = run_ld_pruning}
ld_files <- paste0(config$outputs$ld_prefix, c(".bed", ".bim", ".fam"))

if (!config$run$overwrite && all(file.exists(ld_files))) {
  message("Reusing existing LD-pruned PLINK files: ", config$outputs$ld_prefix)
  ld_prefix <- config$outputs$ld_prefix
} else {
  ld_prefix <- plink_ld_prune(
    input = qc_prefix,
    output = config$outputs$ld_prefix,
    plink = config$plink$path,
    window = config$ld_pruning$window,
    step = config$ld_pruning$step,
    r2 = config$ld_pruning$r2
  )
}

# Loading LD-pruned PLINK data as bigSNP object
ld_obj <- plink_to_bigSNP(
  bed_file = paste0(ld_prefix, ".bed"),
  overwrite = config$run$overwrite
)

G_ld <- ld_obj$genotypes
map_ld <- ld_obj$map
fam_ld <- ld_obj$fam
```

## PCA
```{r, eval = run_pca, include = run_pca}
pca_result <- run_pca_bigsnpr(
  obj = ld_obj,
  n_pcs = config$pca$n_pcs,
  output_file = config$pca$output_file,
  covariates_file = config$pca$covariates_file,
  ncores = config$pca$ncores
)

pca_plot <- plot_pca(
  pca_result = pca_result,
  metadata = metadata,
  sample_col = config$metadata$sample_col,
  color_col = NULL,
  pc_x = 1,
  pc_y = 2
)

pca_plot
```

# GEA
## LMM (GEMMA)
```{r, eval = run_lmm, include = run_lmm}
# GEMMA kinship matrix
gemma_kinship_file <- run_gemma_kinship(
  gemma = config$gemma$path,
  bfile = qc_prefix,
  output_prefix = config$gemma$kinship_prefix,
  output_dir = config$gemma$output_dir,
  overwrite = config$run$overwrite
)
```

```{r, eval = run_lmm, include = run_lmm}
gemma_results <- run_gemma_lmm_strategies(
  config = config,
  qc_prefix = qc_prefix,
  climate_data = climate_data,
  phenotype = config$gemma$phenotype,
  kinship_file = gemma_kinship_file
)

gemma_results$evaluation
gemma_results$best_strategy
```

```{r}
plot_gemma_qq(gemma_results$results, strategy = "kinship_only")
plot_gemma_qq(gemma_results$results, strategy = "kinship_3PCs")
plot_gemma_qq(gemma_results$results, strategy = "kinship_5PCs")
```
